## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated when applicable

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings added for UI changes
- [ ] Demo video updated in README when UI/UX behavior changed
- [ ] "Last updated" date under demo video is current after updates

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env.local` excluded)
- [ ] Changes are scoped and focused
- [ ] Linked issue/ticket (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any context, tradeoffs, or follow-up tasks.
